mapper.select: SELECT COMPANY, WORK_PATTERN_CODE AS workPatternCode, WORK_PATTERN_NAME AS workPatternName, PATTERN_TYPE AS patternType, CYCLE_UNIT AS cycleUnit, CYCLE_COUNT AS cycleCount, START_DATE AS startDate, END_DATE AS endDate, USE_YN AS useYn FROM HRTWORKPATTERNMASTER01 WHERE COMPANY = #{company} ORDER BY WORK_PATTERN_CODE

SELECT COMPANY, WORK_PATTERN_CODE AS workPatternCode, WORK_PATTERN_NAME AS workPatternName, PATTERN_TYPE AS patternType, CYCLE_UNIT AS cycleUnit, CYCLE_COUNT AS cycleCount, START_DATE AS startDate, END_DATE AS endDate, USE_YN AS useYn FROM HRTWORKPATTERNMASTER01 WHERE COMPANY = #{company} AND WORK_PATTERN_CODE = #{workPatternCode}

SELECT D.COMPANY, D.WORK_PATTERN_CODE AS workPatternCode, D.SEQ, D.DAY_TYPE AS dayType, D.SHIFT_CODE AS shiftCode, D.WORK_TYPE_CODE AS workTypeCode, D.WORK_DAY_TYPE AS workDayType, S.SHIFT_NAME AS shiftName FROM HRTWORKPATTERNDETAIL01 D LEFT JOIN HRTSHIFTMASTER01 S ON D.COMPANY = S.COMPANY AND D.SHIFT_CODE = S.SHIFT_CODE WHERE D.COMPANY = #{company} AND D.WORK_PATTERN_CODE = #{workPatternCode} ORDER BY D.SEQ

SELECT COMPANY, SHIFT_CODE AS shiftCode, SHIFT_NAME AS shiftName, WORK_TYPE_CODE AS workTypeCode, WORK_DAY_TYPE AS workDayType, WORK_ON_DAY_TYPE AS workOnDayType, WORK_OFF_DAY_TYPE AS workOffDayType, CONVERT(VARCHAR(5), WORK_ON_HHMM, 108) AS workOnHhmm, CONVERT(VARCHAR(5), WORK_OFF_HHMM, 108) AS workOffHhmm, USE_YN AS useYn, CASE WHEN WORK_ON_HHMM IS NOT NULL AND WORK_OFF_HHMM IS NOT NULL THEN DATEDIFF(MINUTE, WORK_ON_HHMM, WORK_OFF_HHMM) ELSE 0 END AS workMinutes FROM HRTSHIFTMASTER01 WHERE COMPANY = #{company} AND USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY SORT_SEQ, SHIFT_CODE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HRTWORKPATTERNMASTER01 ( COMPANY, WORK_PATTERN_CODE, WORK_PATTERN_NAME, PATTERN_TYPE, CYCLE_UNIT, CYCLE_COUNT, START_DATE, END_DATE, USE_YN, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{company}, #{workPatternCode}, #{workPatternName}, #{patternType}, #{cycleUnit}, #{cycleCount}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{useYn}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE HRTWORKPATTERNMASTER01 SET WORK_PATTERN_NAME = #{workPatternName}, PATTERN_TYPE = #{patternType}, CYCLE_UNIT = #{cycleUnit}, CYCLE_COUNT = #{cycleCount}, START_DATE = #{startDate}, END_DATE = #{endDate}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, UPDATED_AT = GETDATE() WHERE COMPANY = #{company} AND WORK_PATTERN_CODE = #{workPatternCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO HRTWORKPATTERNDETAIL01 ( COMPANY, WORK_PATTERN_CODE, SEQ, DAY_TYPE, SHIFT_CODE, WORK_TYPE_CODE, WORK_DAY_TYPE, CREATED_AT, UPDATED_AT ) VALUES ( #{company}, #{workPatternCode}, #{seq}, #{dayType}, #{shiftCode}, #{workTypeCode}, #{workDayType}, GETDATE(), GETDATE() )
